memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK* There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust* If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX This will be implemented as a Repeater The HDCP TX will be driven by the HDCP RX For details
memberdef.name: details

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Professional
memberdef.name: Professional

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this implementation
memberdef.name: implementation

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by default
memberdef.name: default

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK *There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust *If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX This will be implemented as a Repeater The HDCP TX will be driven by the HDCP RX For please refer to
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK* There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust* If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX This will be implemented as a Repeater The HDCP TX will be driven by the HDCP RX For please refer to PG235
memberdef.name: PG235

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK *There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust *If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX This will be implemented as a Repeater The HDCP TX will be driven by the HDCP RX For please refer to PG236 and PG230 SYSTEM ILLUSTRATION A system illustration is shown as below SOURCE RX TX SINK PROFESSIONAL REPEATER REQUIRED UPDATES In order to build the system the user is required to do a few extra updates to the drivers in order to support the HDCP Professional requirements in the low level drivers and to import the example design in SDK Updated Required to hdcp1x drivers Please make the following updates in the hdcp1x driver In file xhdcp1x
memberdef.definition: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in you need to create a placeholder pointer text file for it To do this go to the following directory< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss examples xhdmi_example dummy Here create a new RepeaterPro_A53 txt and copy the contents of this file into it in order to import the example design in please open the following file in a text editor< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss data dependencies props Next append the following line to the end of the file xhdmi_example dummy RepeaterPro_A53 xhdmi_example RepeaterProfessional xhdmi_example xhdmi_example PassThrough xhdmi_edid xhdmi_example PassThrough xhdmi_edid xhdmi_example xhdmi_hdcp_keys_table xhdmi_example idt_8t49n24x xhdmi_example idt_8t49n24x xhdmi_example xvidframe_crc xhdmi_example xvidframe_crc xhdmi_example PassThrough xhdmi_menu xhdmi_example PassThrough xhdmi_menu xhdmi_example RepeaterProfessional xhdcp xhdmi_example RepeaterProfessional xhdcp xhdmi_example aes256 xhdmi_example aes256 xhdmi_example audiogen_drv xhdmi_example audiogen_drv xhdmi_example dp159 xhdmi_example dp159 xhdmi_example sha256 xhdmi_example sha256 xhdmi_example si5324drv xhdmi_example si5324drv xhdmi_example xhdmi_hdcp_keys xhdmi_example xhdmi_hdcp_keys platforms platform platforms platform platforms platform_config h
memberdef.name: h

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK *There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust *If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX This will be implemented as a Repeater The HDCP TX will be driven by the HDCP RX For please refer to PG236 and PG230 SYSTEM ILLUSTRATION A system illustration is shown as below SOURCE RX TX SINK PROFESSIONAL REPEATER REQUIRED UPDATES In order to build the system the user is required to do a few extra updates to the drivers in order to support the HDCP Professional requirements in the low level drivers and to import the example design in SDK Updated Required to hdcp1x drivers Please make the following updates in the hdcp1x driver In file xhdcp1x In the structure
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK* There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust* If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX This will be implemented as a Repeater The HDCP TX will be driven by the HDCP RX For please refer to PG236 and PG230 SYSTEM ILLUSTRATION A system illustration is shown as below SOURCE RX TX SINK PROFESSIONAL REPEATER REQUIRED UPDATES In order to build the system the user is required to do a few extra updates to the drivers in order to support the HDCP Professional requirements in the low level drivers and to import the example design in SDK Updated Required to hdcp1x drivers Please make the following updates in the hdcp1x driver In file xhdcp1x In the structure XHdcp1x
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK *There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust *If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX This will be implemented as a Repeater The HDCP TX will be driven by the HDCP RX For please refer to PG236 and PG230 SYSTEM ILLUSTRATION A system illustration is shown as below SOURCE RX TX SINK PROFESSIONAL REPEATER REQUIRED UPDATES In order to build the system the user is required to do a few extra updates to the drivers in order to support the HDCP Professional requirements in the low level drivers and to import the example design in SDK Updated Required to hdcp1x drivers Please make the following updates in the hdcp1x driver In file xhdcp1x In the structure add the following variable and it s description u8
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK* There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust* If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX This will be implemented as a Repeater The HDCP TX will be driven by the HDCP RX For please refer to PG236 and PG230 SYSTEM ILLUSTRATION A system illustration is shown as below SOURCE RX TX SINK PROFESSIONAL REPEATER REQUIRED UPDATES In order to build the system the user is required to do a few extra updates to the drivers in order to support the HDCP Professional requirements in the low level drivers and to import the example design in SDK Updated Required to hdcp1x drivers Please make the following updates in the hdcp1x driver In file xhdcp1x In the structure add the following variable and it s description u8 IsProRepeater
memberdef.name: IsProRepeater

briefdescription.para: The IsProRepeater flag determines if | * HDCP is part of a Professional Repeater | * system.

memberdef.type: In file xhdcp1x_port_hdmi_rx
memberdef.definition: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in you need to create a placeholder pointer text file for it To do this go to the following directory< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss examples xhdmi_example dummy Here create a new RepeaterPro_A53 txt and copy the contents of this file into it in order to import the example design in please open the following file in a text editor< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss data dependencies props Next append the following line to the end of the file xhdmi_example dummy RepeaterPro_A53 xhdmi_example RepeaterProfessional xhdmi_example xhdmi_example PassThrough xhdmi_edid xhdmi_example PassThrough xhdmi_edid xhdmi_example xhdmi_hdcp_keys_table xhdmi_example idt_8t49n24x xhdmi_example idt_8t49n24x xhdmi_example xvidframe_crc xhdmi_example xvidframe_crc xhdmi_example PassThrough xhdmi_menu xhdmi_example PassThrough xhdmi_menu xhdmi_example RepeaterProfessional xhdcp xhdmi_example RepeaterProfessional xhdcp xhdmi_example aes256 xhdmi_example aes256 xhdmi_example audiogen_drv xhdmi_example audiogen_drv xhdmi_example dp159 xhdmi_example dp159 xhdmi_example sha256 xhdmi_example sha256 xhdmi_example si5324drv xhdmi_example si5324drv xhdmi_example xhdmi_hdcp_keys xhdmi_example xhdmi_hdcp_keys platforms platform c
memberdef.name: c

memberdef.type: In file xhdcp1x_port_hdmi_rx In the definition of the
memberdef.definition: Add the definition of the following function
memberdef.name: function

memberdef.type: In file xhdcp1x_port_hdmi_rx In the definition of the static int
memberdef.definition: Buf[0]
memberdef.name: Buf

memberdef.definition: else
memberdef.name: else

memberdef.type: Updated Required to v_hdmirxss drivers In the xv_hdmirxss h
memberdef.definition: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in you need to create a placeholder pointer text file for it To do this go to the following directory< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss examples xhdmi_example dummy Here create a new file
memberdef.name: file

memberdef.type: Updated Required to v_hdmirxss drivers In the xv_hdmirxss h In the structure XV_HdmiRxSs add the following
memberdef.definition: Updated Required to v_hdmirxss drivers In the xv_hdmirxss h In the structure XV_HdmiRxSs add the following variable
memberdef.name: variable

memberdef.type: Updated Required to v_hdmirxss drivers In the xv_hdmirxss h In the structure XV_HdmiRxSs add the following u8
memberdef.definition: Updated Required to v_hdmirxss drivers In the xv_hdmirxss h In the structure XV_HdmiRxSs add the following u8 IsHdcpProRepeater
memberdef.name: IsHdcpProRepeater

memberdef.type: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in
memberdef.definition: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in you need to create a placeholder pointer text file for it To do this go to the following directory< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss examples xhdmi_example dummy Here create a new RepeaterPro_A53 txt and copy the contents of this file into it in order to import the example design in SDK
memberdef.name: SDK

memberdef.type: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in you need to create a placeholder pointer text file for it To do this go to the following directory< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss examples xhdmi_example dummy Here create a new RepeaterPro_A53 txt and copy the contents of this file into it
memberdef.definition: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in you need to create a placeholder pointer text file for it To do this go to the following directory<path_to_drivers> v_hdmirxss examples xhdmi_example dummy Here create a new RepeaterPro_A53 txt and copy the contents of this file into it Next
memberdef.name: Next

memberdef.type: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in you need to create a placeholder pointer text file for it To do this go to the following directory< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss examples xhdmi_example dummy Here create a new RepeaterPro_A53 txt and copy the contents of this file into it in order to import the example design in please open the following file in a text editor< path_to_drivers > v_hdmirxss data dependencies props Next append the following line to the end of the file xhdmi_example dummy RepeaterPro_A53
memberdef.definition: BUILDING THE EXAMPLE DESIGN Before you can import this application as an example design in you need to create a placeholder pointer text file for it To do this go to the following directory<path_to_drivers> v_hdmirxss examples xhdmi_example dummy Here create a new RepeaterPro_A53 txt and copy the contents of this file into it in order to import the example design in please open the following file in a text editor<path_to_drivers> v_hdmirxss data dependencies props Next append the following line to the end of the file xhdmi_example dummy RepeaterPro_A53 txt
memberdef.name: txt

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *If Color Bar module is
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* If Color Bar module is selected
memberdef.name: selected

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user selection
memberdef.name: selection

memberdef.type: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *Required updates *Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES *This application implements the HDCP Revision specification *The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK *There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust *If the
memberdef.definition: HDCP REPEATER PROFESSIONAL EXAMPLE DESIGN README CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* Required updates* Building the example design INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI HDCP Professinal Repeater running on the same hardware with HDCP configured as a Repeater For see xhdmi_example c and xhdcp c FEATURES* This application implements the HDCP Revision specification* The application implements the HDCP Professional Repeater built on a HDCP Repeater In this by HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* If Color Bar module is a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK* There is an additional option to not start the colorbar mode when HDCP Repeater is enabled This will make the HDCP authentication process over the Repeater more robust* If the HDCP
memberdef.argsstring: (1.4, 2.2 or both) is enabled by the hardware
memberdef.name: HDCP

memberdef.type: Add the declaration of the following function int
memberdef.definition: In the file xhdcp1x Add the definition the following new int XHdcp1x_SetProRepeater
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_SetProRepeater

briefdescription.para: | * This function sets the Professional Repeater functionality for an | * HDCP interface.

detaileddescription.para:
| * | *
InstancePtr
is the interface to disable. | *
State
is either TRUE or FALSE | * | *
| * - XST_SUCCESS if successful. | * - XST_FAILURE otherwise. | * | *
None. | * |

memberdef.type: In file xhdcp1x_port_hdmi_rx In the definition of the static int
memberdef.definition: In file xhdcp1x_port_hdmi_rx In the definition of the static int XHdcp1x_PortHdmiRxEnable
memberdef.argsstring: (XHdcp1x *InstancePtr) update the following lines with a new check for the value of the IsProRepeater flag.(Update marked as >>>>>)||memset(Buf
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_PortHdmiRxEnable

memberdef.definition: if
memberdef.name: if

memberdef.type: In the file xhdcp1x_rx In the definition of the static void
memberdef.definition: In the file xhdcp1x_rx In the definition of the static void XHdcp1x_RxStartComputations
memberdef.argsstring: (XHdcp1x *InstancePtr,|XHdcp1x_StateType *NextStatePtr) update the following lines with a new check for the value of the IsProRepeater flag.(Update marked as >>>>>)|if(InstancePtr-> IsRepeater && >>>>>|!InstancePtr->IsProRepeater)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_RxStartComputations

memberdef.type: Add the declaration of the function int
memberdef.definition: Add the definition of the following int XV_HdmiRxSs_HdcpSetProRepeater
memberdef.name: XV_HdmiRxSs_HdcpSetProRepeater

briefdescription.para: | * | * This function enables the Professional Repeater functionality for | * the HDCP protocol.

detaileddescription.para:
| * | *
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRxSs instance. | *
Set
is TRUE to enable and FALSE to disable repeater. | * | *
| * - XST_SUCCESS if action was successful | * - XST_FAILURE if action was not successful | * | *
None. | * |

memberdef.type: Add the declaration of the function int
memberdef.definition: In the xv_hdmirxss_hdcp Add the definition the following int XV_HdmiRxSs_HdcpIsProRepeater
memberdef.name: XV_HdmiRxSs_HdcpIsProRepeater

briefdescription.para: | * | * This function checks if the HDMI receiver is an HDCP professional repeater | * upstream interface for the active protocol.

detaileddescription.para:
| * | *
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRxSs instance. | * | *
'IsHdcpProRepeater' flag. | * | *
None. | * |
